name: One-Pan Potatoes and Chicken Teriyaki
recipeIngredient: 2/3 lb (2 medium) potatoes - cut into 1/2-inch wedges
8 oz Chicken breasts - boneless and skinless, cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potato wedges in a shallow 1-quart microwave-safe dish.
2. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner vented.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes until just tender.
4. While the potatoes are cooking, heat a medium nonstick skillet over high heat.
5. Add the chicken strips to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, tossing occasionally until browned.
6. Add the potato wedges to the skillet; toss until lightly browned.
7. Stir in the sliced green onions and teriyaki sauce, cooking until heated through.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times may vary based on your microwave's wattage. Adjust cooking times as needed for your appliance.
